description:
Update all selected Generic Tool Items. For more information on Generic Tool and Correspondence Tool endpoints, 
see [Working with the Correspondence Tool](/documentation/tutorial-correspondence).

parameters.name: generic_tool_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the Generic Tool

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: If supplied customize the response format

parameters.name: completion_mode
parameters.description: Whether to update what can be or nothing if one can not be updated. Defaults to "all_or_nothing"

parameters.name: run_configurable_validations
parameters.description: Whether to run configurable validations during the update operation. Defaults to false.

id.description: The ID of the Generic Tool Item

status.description: status of the update on that Generic Tool Item

id.description: The unique idenfitier of the generic tool item.

due_date.description: The due date for the generic tool item.

private.description: If this property is set to true, the generic tool item is private. If this property is set to false, the generic tool item is not private.

schedule_impact.description: The schedule impact of the generic tool item.

schedule_impact_value.description: Specifies a value for the schedue impact of the generic tool item.

cost_impact.description: The cost impact of the generic tool item.

cost_impact_value.description: Specifies a value for the cost impact of the generic tool item.

status.description: The status of the generic tool item.

received_from_id.description: The unique identifier for the Received From entity for the generic tool item.

location_id.description: The location identifier for the generic tool item.

cost_code_id.description: The cost code identifier for the generic tool item.

specification_section_id.description: The specification section identifier for the generic tool item.

sub_job_id.description: The sub job identifier for the generic tool item.

quantity.description: The quantity of the generic tool item.

uom.description: Unit of measure for the quantity field

trade_id.description: The trade identifier for the generic tool item.

custom_field_%{custom_field_definition_i.description:
Value of the custom field. The data type of the value passed in corresponds with the data_type of the Custom Field Definition.
For a lov_entry data_type the value passed in should be the ID of one ...
